Tragacanth is a type of natural adhesive, also known as gum tragacanth, derived from the sap of certain plants in the legume family. The health benefits of Tragacanth include its use as a natural laxative, to soothe digestive issues, and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The bioactive constituents of Tragacanth include mucilages, polysaccharides, and other complex carbohydrates, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
